name: Dazzling Rosary
description:
Activate Cast a Spell

When energy courses through these lustrous beads, they glow brightly in the sacred colors of the spellcaster's faith. A empowered with this catalyst flashes with bright light when it critically Strikes a target, causing the target to be until the beginning of your next turn. The rosary can be used with a spiritual weapon of 4th level or below.
